description: The RPLY MCP is here and available to all desktop agents. We also squashed quite a few platform bugs that made the
title: RPLY MCP & Platforms
fixes: X DMs no longer vanish, go stale, or show empty
WhatsApp QR spinner no longer hangs forever
Keyboard shortcuts work on first press in two-pane layout
Group chat names and avatars display correctly
Dark mode tapback reactions are readable again
Contact priorities and category moves persist across launches
Conversations switch without layout jitter or stuck states
Runs cooler with multi-GB memory spikes eliminated
features: Telegram login with OTP verification, no browser needed
Disable connected platforms without disconnecting them
Persist your priority filters between launches
Reset app data from settings when things get weird
RPLY MCP available to all agents
